name: byte-bridges-atlas
description: JSON-driven living-doc generator. One JSON file → one self-contained interactive HTML atlas (hash-routed drill-down, Monte Carlo schedule simulation, risk register, security model, devlog). Reusable across project plans, constitutions, runbooks, and knowledge bases.

scripts.smoke: node bin/bb-atlas validate project.template.json && node bin/bb-atlas generate project.template.json /tmp/bb-atlas-smoke.html

author: CaptainRandom00
